text: 🔄 Forwarded from Pavel Durov: 🇪🇺 The EU is trying to justify its push for more surveillance (Chat Control) and censorship (DSA) via controlled NGOs and media. AI Forensics, a Soros-funded contractor to the European Commission, is telling us that Telegram is a PROBLEM because people can discuss content from OTHER social media in PRIVATE telegram groups (see the screenshot from state-owned France24 below). 📣 The crazy narrative of this "non-governmental" organization is distributed by globalist outlets (El País, Der Spiegel, Wired) and AFP (France’s “ITAR-TASS”), which is carbon-copied by the “free” French press (Le Parisien, 20 Minutes, Ouest-France, Le Figaro). I doubt anyone still takes these organizations seriously 🤡 — most of them lost people's trust during the COVID era. But it’s important to call out all such attempts at public manipulation, because they are used to take away what's left of our freedoms. 🗽
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Pavel Durov：🇪🇺 欧盟正试图通过受控的非政府组织和媒体，为其加强监控（聊天控制）和审查（数字服务法案，DSA）的行为辩护。欧盟委员会资助的承包商 AI Forensics 告诉我们，Telegram 是一个“问题”，因为人们可以在私密的 Telegram 群组中讨论来自“其他”社交媒体的内容（见下方来自国有媒体 France24 的截图）。📣 这个“非政府”组织的疯狂叙事被全球主义媒体（《国家报》、《明镜周刊》、《连线》）和法新社（法国的“塔斯社”）所散布，并被“自由”的法国媒体（《巴黎人报》、《20分钟报》、《法国西部报》、《费加罗报》）照搬。我怀疑还有没有人会认真对待这些组织🤡——它们中的大多数在新冠疫情期间失去了人们的信任。但重要的是要揭露所有此类操纵公众的企图，因为它们被用来夺走我们仅存的自由。🗽

text: 🇷🇺 The FSB has detained three more members of Shamil Basayev and Khattab's gangs, who were involved in attacks on Russian military personnel in 1999–2000. According to the Investigative Committee of Russia, they participated in the invasion of Dagestan and the attack on Pskov paratroopers. At that time, more than 130 servicemen were killed and over 80 were injured. The terrorists have been charged with committing crimes, including "armed rebellion, participation in a gang, and attempted murder of military personnel". 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 俄罗斯联邦安全局（FSB）又逮捕了三名沙米尔·巴萨耶夫和哈塔卜团伙的成员，他们参与了 1999 年至 2000 年针对俄罗斯军事人员的袭击。据俄罗斯调查委员会称，他们参与了对达吉斯坦的入侵和对普斯科夫伞兵的袭击。当时，超过 130 名军人丧生，80 多人受伤。这些恐怖分子被控犯有包括“武装叛乱、参与团伙犯罪和谋杀军事人员未遂”在内的罪行。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF said more than 200 rocket launchers and around 1,300 launch tubes belonging to Hezbollah have been destroyed since the start of the campaign in southern Lebanon. Over 250 Hezbollah artillery operatives have been killed, including 15 commanders responsible for artillery units across multiple sectors. This includes Ali Kamal Abul Hassan, identified as an artillery officer in Hezbollah’s Nasser unit. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军表示，自黎巴嫩南部军事行动开始以来，已摧毁了超过 200 个属于真主党的火箭发射器和约 1,300 个发射管。超过 250 名真主党炮兵人员被击毙，其中包括 15 名负责多个区域炮兵部队的指挥官。这包括被确认为真主党纳赛尔部队炮兵军官的阿里·卡迈勒·阿布·哈桑。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 "Netanyahu wanted us to strike Iran. He came to President Obama. He made a presentation to ask to strike. President Obama refused. President Biden refused. President Bush refused. The only president who has agreed to this, obviously, is President Trump." - John Kerry, Former Secretary of State 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 “内塔尼亚胡想让我们打击伊朗。他来到奥巴马总统面前。他做了一个演示，请求进行打击。奥巴马总统拒绝了。拜登总统拒绝了。布什总统拒绝了。显然，唯一同意这一点的总统是特朗普总统。”——前国务卿约翰·克里 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel OSINTYB: Isfahan: Iran appears to be sealing off its nuclear tunnels. Latest satellite imagery shows all 3 tunnel entrances blocked, with added barriers including earth berms, debris, fencing, and access obstacles designed to slow or prevent entry. Assessment: not reopening the site, but locking it down against intrusion. According to the IAEA, the complex may hold a significant portion of Iran’s 60% enriched uranium, potentially enough for multiple weapons, and possibly a hidden enrichment facility. Ground access is being deliberately complicated. Activity on site continues, including vehicles, checkpoints, and equipment, indicating tight security. Overall signal: the regime is securing a highly sensitive site it expects could be targeted. @TheGoodISIS @OsintYB Looks like Iran established makeshift roadblocks outside the three tunnel entrances to the underground facility at the Esfahan Nuclear Complex. This provides an additional obstacle for any potential ground operation to seize the enriched uranium. Essentially an effort to limit freedom of movement and slow down any incursion. The roadblocks can be cleared, it would just be an additional consideration. Good catch, @SarahBurkhard! Stay tuned for more analysis. - Spencer Faragasso tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT 开源情报 OSINTYB：伊斯法罕：伊朗似乎正在封锁其核隧道。最新的卫星图像显示，所有 3 个隧道入口都被封锁，并增加了包括土堤、碎片、围栏和旨在减缓或阻止进入的通道障碍物在内的额外屏障。评估：不是重新开放该地点，而是将其封锁以防入侵。据国际原子能机构称，该综合体可能拥有伊朗 60% 浓缩铀的很大一部分，可能足以制造多枚武器，并可能存在一个隐藏的浓缩设施。地面通道正在被蓄意复杂化。现场活动仍在继续，包括车辆、检查站和设备，表明安保严密。总体信号：该政权正在保护一个它认为可能成为目标的极其敏感的地点。@TheGoodISIS @OsintYB 看起来伊朗在伊斯法罕核综合体地下设施的三个隧道入口外建立了临时路障。这为任何可能夺取浓缩铀的地面行动提供了额外的障碍。本质上是为了限制行动自由并减缓任何入侵。路障可以被清除，但这只是一个额外的考虑因素。好发现，@SarahBurkhard！敬请关注更多分析。- Spencer Faragasso 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 👀 🇺🇦 Zelensky: 🗣️ “I believe Putin understands he cannot fully occupy Ukraine. He sends messages to our allies that do not reflect his real intentions.” 📌 “He has suffered heavy losses and lacks enough well-trained troops on the battlefield. He is looking for an outcome that resembles a victory, which is why he is trying to push us out of Donbas through diplomacy, particularly via dialogue with the United States.” 📌 “To fully seize Donbas, Russia would have to sacrifice between 300,000 and 1 million troops, depending on the timeframe of the operation — a cost that is extremely high even for Putin.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：❗️ 👀 🇺🇦 泽连斯基：🗣️ “我相信普京明白他无法完全占领乌克兰。他向我们的盟友发送的信息并不能反映他的真实意图。” 📌 “他遭受了惨重损失，战场上缺乏足够的训练有素的部队。他正在寻找一个类似于胜利的结果，这就是为什么他试图通过外交手段，特别是通过与美国的对话，将我们挤出顿巴斯。” 📌 “为了完全夺取顿巴斯，俄罗斯将不得不牺牲 30 万到 100 万名士兵，具体取决于行动的时间框架——即使对普京来说，这也是一个极其高昂的代价。” 与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel A U.S. Air Force transport jet marked “Charleston” was seen approaching PAF Base Nur Khan in Rawalpindi as Pakistan prepared to host U.S.–Iran talks on April 10, 2026. The aircraft, tail 01-0015 using callsign SAM033, likely carried a senior U.S. official tied to Iran talks. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042534394682921402/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：一架标有“查尔斯顿”字样的美国空军运输机被发现正在接近拉瓦尔品第的努尔汗巴基斯坦空军基地，当时巴基斯坦正准备于 2026 年 4 月 10 日主办美伊会谈。图片：路透社 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042560145981309169/photo/1 一架美国空军 C-40 VIP 专机从拉姆施泰因飞往伊斯兰堡，此后已离开。该飞机尾号 01-0015，呼号 SAM033，很可能搭载了一名与伊朗会谈有关的美国高级官员。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042534394682921402/photo/1 - 开源情报 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @felix_drost : @Felix_Nuno @klaasm67 Yes big risk/reward. A European security that doesn't include the emergent capabilities and mindset of Ukraine, and actually risks losing these to Russia, is a fragile one which has no strategic vision and can set no agenda. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @felix_drost：@Felix_Nuno @klaasm67 是的，高风险/高回报。一个不包括乌克兰新兴能力和思维方式，且实际上冒着将这些能力输给俄罗斯风险的欧洲安全体系，是一个脆弱的体系，它没有战略愿景，也无法设定任何议程。推文

text: 🇺🇸 A Boeing KC-135R Stratotanker of the United States Air Force squawked emergency code 7700 north of Crete before presumably landing at Chania International Airport, according to FlightRadar data. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 根据 FlightRadar 数据，一架美国空军波音 KC-135R 空中加油机在克里特岛以北发出 7700 紧急代码，随后推测降落在哈尼亚国际机场。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 The US VIP Air Force Boeing C-40B (tail 01-0015, callsign SAM033) Makes Quick Stop in Islamabad Amid High-Stakes US-Iran Peace Talks As of now, there is still no publicly visible Iranian VIP or government flight on Flightradar24 (or similar trackers). Iranian government aircraft (such as Airbus A321 EP-IGD or A340 EP-IGA, often flown under IRANxx callsigns) show no activity on this route. As Iran has stated it remains firm on its condition: no negotiations will take place while Israeli attacks continue on Lebanon. The situation remains fluid, but Iran's principled stand continues to shape the outcome.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 美国 VIP 空军波音 C-40B（尾号 01-0015，呼号 SAM033）在高风险美伊和平谈判期间在伊斯兰堡短暂停留。截至目前，Flightradar24（或类似追踪器）上仍没有公开可见的伊朗 VIP 或政府航班。伊朗政府飞机（如空中客车 A321 EP-IGD 或 A340 EP-IGA，通常以 IRANxx 呼号飞行）在此航线上没有活动。正如伊朗所言，其立场依然坚定：在以色列继续对黎巴嫩发动袭击的情况下，不会进行任何谈判。局势仍然不稳定，但伊朗的原则立场继续影响着结果。

text: Open Source Intel A Pakistani source close to Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif says the country’s defense minister was forced to delete a post attacking Israel, in which he called it an “evil state” and “a curse on humanity” over its strikes in Lebanon. According to the source, both military and political leadership in Pakistan were angered by the statement, viewing it as undermining de-escalation efforts led by Islamabad, and pressured him to remove it. @kaisos1987 Pakistan’s defense minister deletes tweet calling for the annihilation of the “cancerous state on Palestinian land.” Pakistans Asif is a coward. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042557535207436335/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：一位接近巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫的消息人士称，该国国防部长被迫删除了一篇攻击以色列的帖子，他在帖子中因以色列在黎巴嫩的袭击而称其为“邪恶国家”和“人类的诅咒”。据该消息人士称，巴基斯坦的军事和政治领导层都对这一声明感到愤怒，认为这破坏了伊斯兰堡主导的缓和局势的努力，并向他施压要求删除。@kaisos1987 巴基斯坦国防部长删除推文，呼吁消灭“巴勒斯坦土地上的癌变国家”。巴基斯坦的阿西夫是个懦夫。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042557535207436335/photo/1 - 开源情报 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pakistan’s military and political leadership were angered by the tweet, viewing it as undermining Islamabad’s de-escalation efforts, and pushed for its removal. Pakistan’s defense minister deletes tweet calling for the annihilation of the “cancerous state on Palestinian land.” Pakistans Asif is a coward. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042557535207436335/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：巴基斯坦的军事和政治领导层对该推文感到愤怒，认为这破坏了伊斯兰堡的缓和局势努力，并推动将其删除。巴基斯坦国防部长删除推文，呼吁消灭“巴勒斯坦土地上的癌变国家”。巴基斯坦的阿西夫是个懦夫。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042557535207436335/photo/1 - 开源情报 推文

text: 🇷🇺 🇬🇧 British sources say the Russian frigate Admiral Grigorovich escorted two “shadow tankers” through the English Channel on Wednesday. The UK support ship RFA Tideforce followed at a distance, monitoring the transit. The Guardian framed it as Putin “mocking” Prime Minister Keir Starmer, who had previously vowed to seize sanctioned Russian vessels. At the same time, The Telegraph reports that the UK hasn’t detained a single Russian-flagged ship this year, citing government concerns over violating international law. The pattern is obvious: when Russian vessels sail unprotected, there’s talk of seizures. When they’re escorted by armed warships—and tankers carry security ready to respond—suddenly international law takes priority. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇬🇧 英国消息人士称，俄罗斯护卫舰“格里戈罗维奇海军上将”号周三护送两艘“影子油轮”穿过英吉利海峡。英国支援舰“RFA Tideforce”号在后方保持距离，监视其航行。《卫报》将其描述为普京在“嘲弄”英国首相基尔·斯塔默，后者曾誓言要扣押受制裁的俄罗斯船只。与此同时，《每日电讯报》报道称，英国今年尚未扣押一艘俄罗斯籍船只，理由是政府担心违反国际法。模式很明显：当俄罗斯船只在没有保护的情况下航行时，就会谈论扣押。当它们由武装军舰护送——且油轮携带随时准备应对的安保人员时——国际法突然变得优先了。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸⚔️🇮🇷 U.S. Army Survivors dispute Pentagon account of Kuwait drone strike, say unit left exposed and unprepared U.S. Army survivors of a deadly drone strike in Kuwait dispute Pentagon claims, saying their unit was left exposed and lacked meaningful defenses…" 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 A US Army survivor of the deadliest Iranian attack on American forces since the war began is disputing the Pentagon's account, saying their unit in Kuwait was left exposed. The soldier spoke anonymously, without authorization from the military. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸⚔️🇮🇷 美国陆军幸存者反驳五角大楼关于科威特无人机袭击的说法，称部队处于暴露和毫无准备的状态。科威特致命无人机袭击的美国陆军幸存者反驳了五角大楼的说法，称他们的部队处于暴露状态，缺乏有效的防御……” 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 一名自战争开始以来针对美军最致命的伊朗袭击的美国陆军幸存者正在反驳五角大楼的说法，称他们在科威特的部队处于暴露状态。这名士兵在未经军方授权的情况下匿名发表了讲话。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 IDF: On Thursday, the Israeli military conducted precise strikes in the northern and southern Gaza Strip, killing Hamas Nukhba member Ahmed Mohammed Saleh and Kata’ib al-Mujahideen militant Mahmoud Barim alongside other fighters. According to the IDF, these targeted individuals were actively planning imminent attacks against Israeli forces, with Barim actively monitoring troop movements and Saleh having a history of executing prior assaults. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列国防军：周四，以色列军方在加沙地带北部和南部进行了精确打击，击毙了哈马斯“努赫巴”（Nukhba）成员艾哈迈德·穆罕默德·萨利赫和“圣战者旅”（Kata’ib al-Mujahideen）武装分子马哈茂德·巴里姆以及其他武装人员。据以色列国防军称，这些被针对的目标正在积极策划针对以色列军队的迫在眉睫的袭击，巴里姆一直在积极监视部队动向，而萨利赫有执行过往袭击的历史。@wfwitness

text: 🟡 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Violent clashes have been ongoing since the morning between the resistance and occupation forces on the outskirts of the city of Bint Jbeil in southern Lebanon.
text_zh: 🟡 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 自清晨以来，抵抗力量与占领军在黎巴嫩南部宾特朱拜勒市郊区持续发生激烈冲突。

text: 🇷🇺 🇨🇺 Russia and Cuba are discussing the resumption of flights - Deputy Foreign Minister Ryabkov at a press conference at the Russian Embassy in Havana. Russia is not going to leave the Western Hemisphere, no matter what they say in Washington, he said. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇨🇺 俄罗斯和古巴正在讨论恢复航班——副外长里亚布科夫在俄罗斯驻哈瓦那大使馆的新闻发布会上表示。他说，无论华盛顿怎么说，俄罗斯都不会离开西半球。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Zelensky: It’s a pity, but we have to recognize that some Americans feel that it’s not such a big price for us—for peace—to leave our territories. They don’t want to recognize that Putin will lie to them and continue the occupation even after such steps. I think that is the biggest problem: we don’t trust Putin, but they do.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：很遗憾，但我们必须承认，一些美国人认为，为了和平而放弃我们的领土对我们来说代价并不大。他们不想承认普京会欺骗他们，即使在采取这些步骤后也会继续占领。我认为这是最大的问题：我们不信任普京，但他们信任。

text: Zelensky: With Ukraine, Türkiye, Norway and UK you will control security on the seas — not one sea.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：有了乌克兰、土耳其、挪威和英国，你们将控制海上的安全——不仅仅是一个海。

text: Zelensky: We have to save our country, and then the economy. First of all, security; second is the economy—not the other way around.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：我们必须先拯救我们的国家，然后才是经济。首先是安全；其次是经济——而不是反过来。

text: Zelensky: Without Ukraine and Türkiye, Europe will not have an army similar to Russia’s.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：没有乌克兰和土耳其，欧洲将不会拥有一支类似于俄罗斯的军队。

text: 🇪🇸 🇪🇺 🇺🇸 ⚡ Spanish Foreign Minister: NATO will not participate in any military operation to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
text_zh: 🇪🇸 🇪🇺 🇺🇸 ⚡ 西班牙外交大臣：北约不会参与任何重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的军事行动。

text: 🇮🇶 ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇰🇼 Saudi Arabia's Al Arabiya reports from its sources: The drones that were fired at Kuwait last night and targeted the country's vital infrastructure were fired from Iraq, not Iran.
text_zh: 🇮🇶 ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇰🇼 沙特阿拉伯《阿拉伯电视台》援引其消息来源报道：昨晚向科威特发射并针对该国重要基础设施的无人机是从伊拉克发射的，而不是伊朗。

text: 🇺🇦 Ukrainians call for fighting until victory but flee from mobilization - Budanov. "There are real problems, let's say, mental problems in our society. Because, on the one hand, everyone says that we need to fight until victory - and on the other hand, everyone is fleeing from mobilization. And all this is happening at the same time. This is a big, huge problem. He added that when those who serve return from the front, "they will start asking questions to their neighbors who haven't gone." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 乌克兰人呼吁战斗到底，但却逃避动员——布达诺夫。“我们的社会存在真正的问题，可以说是心理问题。因为一方面，每个人都说我们需要战斗到胜利——而另一方面，每个人都在逃避动员。所有这一切都在同时发生。这是一个巨大的、严重的问题。” 他补充说，当那些服役的人从前线回来时，“他们会开始质问那些没有去参战的邻居。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇦 Great, now do that in Ukraine 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 ⚡️ A Russian-flagged supertanker passed through the Strait of Hormuz into the Persian Gulf, marking a rare passage for one of the nation's ships as traders scrutinize every transit through the war-hit waterway.
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 一艘俄罗斯籍超级油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡进入波斯湾，这是该国船只罕见的一次航行，因为交易员们正在仔细审查每一艘通过这个饱受战争蹂躏的水道的船只。

text: 🇷🇺 💬 🇺🇦 "Russia will not give such gifts to anyone." Moscow will respond to any hostile actions of Kiev, and the Armed Forces of Ukraine will not be able to use the Easter truce to gain military advantages, Russian Ambassador At Large Miroshnik stated 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 A two-week ceasefire will not return the energy market to normal conditions. Hashem Orei, head of the Union of Iran's Energy Scientific Associations, told IRNA: The two-week ceasefire agreement will not normalize conditions in the energy market, and what has occurred in the form of falling oil prices has been a release of part of the price bubble. If the ceasefire is fully implemented, the normal process of energy transportation will gradually resume, and this can reduce the psychological pressure on the oil market. It is predicted that if the ceasefire is properly implemented, a large number of ships that have been stopped in the region will be able to resume movement. In that case, global oil prices will drop quickly. However, I do not think prices will reach the range of $50 or $60, because concerns still remain in the market. My prediction is that oil prices will likely settle in the range of about $80 to $90, as the market will wait for the outcome of negotiations.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 为期两周的停火不会使能源市场恢复正常。伊朗能源科学协会联盟负责人哈希姆·奥雷伊告诉伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社（IRNA）：为期两周的停火协议不会使能源市场状况正常化，油价下跌的形式只是释放了部分价格泡沫。如果停火得到全面执行，能源运输的正常流程将逐渐恢复，这可以减轻石油市场的心理压力。据预测，如果停火得到妥善执行，该地区大量停航的船只将能够恢复航行。在这种情况下，全球油价将迅速下跌。然而，我不认为价格会达到 50 美元或 60 美元的区间，因为市场仍然存在担忧。我的预测是，油价可能会稳定在 80 美元至 90 美元左右，因为市场将等待谈判结果。
